reviews.comment:
las mejores hamburguesas y todo al instante super caliente. buena atencion. gentileza de las cajeras.

The best burgers, and everything is served piping hot and fresh. Great service. The cashiers were very friendly.

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención de una mujer en la caja. Mal trato. Me cobro lo de otro sin preguntar nada. Contestaba mal. Nos quedamos sin comprar más cosas que teníamos en la mano, por su mal trato. Horrible

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service from a woman at the checkout. She was rude and charged me for someone else without asking. She was also very disrespectful. We ended up not buying anything else we had in our hands because of her rudeness. Awful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURuM1pTYVZBEAE

reviews.comment:
El mejor servicio para un descanso obligado en mitad de tu viaje a la costa.

(Translated by Google)
The best service for a much-needed break in the middle of your trip to the coast.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURubkpTamhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Fui al restaurante. Lo renovaron . Me gustaba mas el aspecto de bodegón con los productos a la vista sobre el mostrador que solía consumir  y comprar para llevar. Ahora hay menos variedad, no parece casero y es notablemente mas caro. Los sandwiches ricos

(Translated by Google)
I went to the restaurant. They renovated it. I liked the diner-like feel of the restaurant, with the products on display on the counter. I used to eat in and buy takeout. Now there's less variety, it doesn't look homemade, and it's noticeably more expensive. The sandwiches are delicious.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURubE16aWhBRRAB
